name: InfluxDB 2
description: The leading platform for time series data
compose:
name: slashnode-influxdb2
services:
  app:
    image: influxdb:2.9.1-alpine
    container_name: influxdb2
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - app_data-data:/var/lib/influxdb2
      - app_data-config:/etc/influxdb2
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8886:8086
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-data:
    name: slashnode-influxdb2_app_data-data
  app_data-config:
    name: slashnode-influxdb2_app_data-config
